Spellcasting.name: Conjuração
Spellcasting.description:
The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} casts one of the following spells, requiring no spell components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC [[lookup @attributes.spell.dc]]):

At Will: @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplDetectEvil]{Detect Evil and Good}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplDruidcraft]{Druidcraft}

1/Day Each: @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplCalmEmotio]{Calm Emotions}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplDispelEvil]{Dispel Evil and Good}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplEntangle00]{Entangle}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplPasswithou]{Pass without Trace}, @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplWordofReca]{Word of Recall}

Detect Evil and Good.name: Detect Evil and Good
Detect Evil and Good.description:
For the duration, you sense the location of any Aberration, Celestial, Elemental, Fey, Fiend, or Undead within 30 feet of yourself. You also sense whether the @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplHallow0000]{Hallow} spell is active there and, if so, where.

The spell is blocked by 1 foot of stone, dirt, or wood; 1 inch of metal; or a thin sheet of lead.

Druidcraft.name: Druidcraft
Druidcraft.description:
Whispering to the spirits of nature, you create one of the following effects within range.

Weather Sensor. You create a Tiny, harmless sensory effect that predicts what the weather will be at your location for the next 24 hours. The effect might manifest as a golden orb for clear skies, a cloud for rain, falling snowflakes for snow, and so on. This effect persists for 1 round.

Bloom. You instantly make a flower blossom, a seed pod open, or a leaf bud bloom.

Sensory Effect. You create a harmless sensory effect, such as falling leaves, spectral dancing fairies, a gentle breeze, the sound of an animal, or the faint odor of skunk. The effect must fit in a 5-foot Cube.

Fire Play. You light or snuff out a candle, a torch, or a campfire.

Calm Emotions.name: Calm Emotions
Calm Emotions.description:
Each Humanoid in a 20-foot-radius Sphere centered on a point you choose within range must succeed on a Charisma saving throw or be affected by one of the following effects (choose for each creature):

  • The creature has Immunity to the Charmed and Frightened conditions until the spell ends. If the creature was already Charmed or Frightened, those conditions are suppressed for the duration.
  • The creature becomes Indifferent about creatures of your choice that it's Hostile toward. This indifference ends if the target takes damage or witnesses its allies taking damage. When the spell ends, the creature's attitude returns to normal.

Calmed.name: Calmed
Calmed.description: The creature has Immunity to the Charmed and Frightened conditions until the spell ends. If the creature was already Charmed or Frightened, those conditions are suppressed for the duration.

Indifference.name: Indifference
Indifference.description: The creature becomes Indifferent about creatures of your choice that it’s Hostile toward. This indifference ends if the target takes damage or witnesses its allies taking damage. When the spell ends, the creature’s attitude returns to normal.

Dispel Evil and Good.name: Dispel Evil and Good
Dispel Evil and Good.description:
For the duration, Celestials, Elementals, Fey, Fiends, and Undead have Disadvantage on attack rolls against you. You can end the spell early by using either of the following special functions.

Break Enchantment. As a Magic action, you touch a creature that is possessed by or has the &Reference[Charmed] or &Reference[Frightened] condition from one or more creatures of the types above. The target is no longer possessed, Charmed, or Frightened by such creatures.

Dismissal. As a Magic action, you target one creature you can see within 5 feet of you that has one of the creature types above. The target must succeed on a Charisma saving throw or be sent back to its home plane if it isn't there already. If they aren't on their home plane, Undead are sent to the Shadowfell, and Fey are sent to the Feywild.

Dispelling Evil and Good.name: Dispelling Evil and Good
Dispelling Evil and Good.description: For the duration, Celestials, Elementals, Fey, Fiends, and Undead have Disadvantage on attack rolls against you. You can end the spell early by using either of the following special functions: Break Enchantment or Dismissal.

Entangle.name: Entangle
Entangle.description:
Grasping plants sprout from the ground in a 20-foot square within range. For the duration, these plants turn the ground in the area into &Reference[difficultterrain]. They disappear when the spell ends.

Each creature (other than you) in the area when you cast the spell must succeed on a Strength saving throw or have the &Reference[restrained apply=false] condition until the spell ends. A Restrained creature can take an action to make a [[/check ability=str skill=ath dc=@attributes.spell.dc]] check against your spell save DC. On a success, it frees itself from the grasping plants and is no longer Restrained by them.

Restrained.name: Restrained
Restrained.description: A Restrained creature can take an action to make a [[/check ability=str skill=ath]] check against your spell save DC. On a success, it frees itself from the grasping plants and is no longer Restrained by them.

Pass without Trace.name: Pass without Trace
Pass without Trace.description: You radiate a concealing aura in a 30-foot Emanation for the duration. While in the aura, you and each creature you choose have a +10 bonus to [[/check ability=dex skill=ste]] checks and leave no tracks.

Concealed.name: Concealed
Concealed.description: While in the aura, you and each creature you choose have a +10 bonus to [[/check ability=dex skill=ste]] checks and leave no tracks.

Word of Recall.name: Word of Recall
Word of Recall.description:
You and up to five willing creatures within 5 feet of you instantly teleport to a previously designated sanctuary. You and any creatures that teleport with you appear in the nearest unoccupied space to the spot you designated when you prepared your sanctuary (see below). If you cast this spell without first preparing a sanctuary, the spell has no effect.

You must designate a location, such as a temple, as a sanctuary by casting this spell there.

Charging Horn.name: Charging Horn
Charging Horn.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} moves up to half its Speed without provoking &Reference[Opportunity Attacks], and it makes one [[/item Radiant Horn]] attack.

Shimmering Shield.name: Shimmering Shield
Shimmering Shield.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} targets itself or one [[lookup @target.affects.type activity=sl8NoPhB0e5z6jmK]] it can see within [[lookup @range.value activity=sl8NoPhB0e5z6jmK]] feet of itself. The target gains [[/healing average temp]], and its AC increases by 2 until the end of the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}'s' next turn. The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

Shielded.name: Shielded
Shielded.description: The target's AC increases by 2 until the end of the bestower's next turn.

Unicorn's Blessing.name: Unicorn's Blessing
Unicorn's Blessing.description: The [[lookup @name]]{monster} touches another creature with its horn and casts @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplCureWounds]{Cure Wounds} or @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplLesserRest]{Lesser Restoration} on that creature, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

Cure Wounds.name: Cure Wounds
Cure Wounds.description:
A creature you touch regains a number of Hit Points equal to 2d8 plus your spellcasting ability modifier.

Using a Higher-Level Spell Slot. The healing increases by 2d8 for each spell slot level above 1.

Lesser Restoration.name: Lesser Restoration
Lesser Restoration.description: You touch a creature and end one condition on it: &Reference[blinded], &Reference[deafened], &Reference[paralyzed], or &Reference[poisoned].

Vampire.name: Vampire
Vampire.description:
Vampires

@Embed[Compendium.dnd5e.content24.JournalEntry.mmAppendixMonste.JournalEntryPage.y4ooBM6PNZfWH3Tv caption=false cite=false classes="no-embed mm"]

Arte do Token por Forgotten Adventures.

Legendary Resistance.name: Legendary Resistance
Legendary Resistance.description: If the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

Misty Escape.name: Misty Escape
Misty Escape.description:
If the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} drops to 0 Hit Points outside its resting place, the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} uses Shape-Shift to become mist (no action required). If it can't use Shape-Shift, it is destroyed.

While it has 0 Hit Points in mist form, it can't return to its vampire form, and it must reach its resting place within 2 hours or be destroyed. Once in its resting place, it returns to its vampire form and has the &Reference[Paralyzed apply=false] condition until it regains any Hit Points, and it regains 1 Hit Point after spending 1 hour there.

Paralyzed.name: Paralyzed
Paralyzed.description: Once in its resting place, it returns to its vampire form and has the &Reference[Paralyzed apply=false] condition until it regains any Hit Points, and it regains 1 Hit Point after spending 1 hour there.

Spider Climb.name: Spider Climb
Spider Climb.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can climb difficult surfaces, including along ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

Multiattack (Vampire Form Only).name: Multiattack (Vampire Form Only)
Multiattack (Vampire Form Only).description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} makes two [[/item .mmGraveStrike000]]{Grave Strike} attacks and uses [[/item .mmBite0000000000]]{Bite}.

Grave Strike (Vampire Form Only).name: Grave Strike (Vampire Form Only)
Grave Strike (Vampire Form Only).description: [[/attack extended]]. [[/damage average extended]]. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the &Reference[Grappled apply=false] condition (escape DC [[lookup @skills.ath.passive]]) from one of two hands.

Grappled.name: Grappled
Grappled.description: If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the &Reference[Grappled apply=false] condition (escape DC [[/check ability=str skill=ath format=long]], see source item for DC) from one of two hands.

Bite (Bat or Vampire Form Only).name: Bite (Bat or Vampire Form Only)
Bite (Bat or Vampire Form Only).description:
Constitution Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=ngPzlEI5pVSdBv86]], one [[lookup @target.affects.type activity=ngPzlEI5pVSdBv86]] within [[lookup @range.value activity=ngPzlEI5pVSdBv86]] feet [[lookup @target.affects.special activity=ngPzlEI5pVSdBv86]].

Failure: [[/damage average]] damage. The target's Hit Point maximum decreases by an amount equal to the Necrotic damage taken, and the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} regains Hit Points equal to that amount. A Humanoid reduced to 0 Hit Points by this damage and then buried rises the following sunset as a @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.actors24.Actor.mmVampireSpawn00]{Vampire Spawn} under the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}'s control.

Charm.name: Charm
Charm.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} casts @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplCharmPerso], requiring no spell components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC [[lookup @abilities.cha.dc]]), and the duration is [[lookup @duration.value activity=fcRXSTOlFJShCl52]] hours. The &Reference[Charmed apply=false] target is a willing recipient of the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}'s [[/item .mmBite0000000000]]{Bite}, the damage of which doesn't end the spell. When the spell ends, the target is unaware it was Charmed by the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}.

Charm Person.name: Charm Person
Charm Person.description:
One Humanoid you can see within range makes a Wisdom saving throw. It does so with Advantage if you or your allies are fighting it. On a failed save, the target has the &Reference[charmed apply=false] condition until the spell ends or until you or your allies damage it. The Charmed creature is Friendly to you. When the spell ends, the target knows it was Charmed by you.

Using a Higher-Level Spell Slot. You can target one additional creature for each spell slot level above 1.

Charmed.name: Charmed
Charmed.description: the target has the &Reference[charmed apply=false] condition until the spell ends or until you or your allies damage it. The Charmed creature is Friendly to you. When the spell ends, the target knows it was Charmed by you.

Shape-Shift.name: Shape-Shift
Shape-Shift.description:
If the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} isn't in sunlight or running water, it shape-shifts into a Tiny @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.actors24.Actor.mmBat00000000000]{bat} (Speed 5 ft., Fly Speed 30 ft.) or a Medium cloud of mist (Speed 5 ft., Fly Speed 20 ft. [hover]), or it returns to its vampire form. Anything it is wearing transforms with it.

While in bat form, the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can't speak. Its game statistics, other than its size and Speed, are unchanged.

While in mist form, the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can't take any actions, speak, or manipulate objects. It is weightless and can enter an enemy's space and stop there. If air can pass through a space, the mist can do so, but it can't pass through liquid. It has Resistance to all damage, except the damage it takes from sunlight.

Beguile.name: Beguile
Beguile.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} casts @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.spells24.Item.phbsplCommand000], requiring no spell components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC [[lookup @abilities.cha.dc]]). The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can't take this action again until the start of its next turn.

Command.name: Command
Command.description:
You speak a one-word command to a creature you can see within range. The target must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or follow the command on its next turn. Choose the command from these options:

Approach. The target moves toward you by the shortest and most direct route, ending its turn if it moves within 5 feet of you.

Drop. The target drops whatever it is holding and then ends its turn.

Flee. The target spends its turn moving away from you by the fastest available means.

Grovel. The target has the Prone condition and then ends its turn.

Halt. On its turn, the target doesn't move and takes no action or Bonus Action.

Using a Higher-Level Spell Slot. You can affect one additional creature for each spell slot level above 1.

Deathless Strike.name: Deathless Strike
Deathless Strike.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} moves up to half its Speed, and it makes one [[/item .mmGraveStrike000]]{Grave Strike} attack.

Vampire Weakness.name: Vampire Weakness
Vampire Weakness.description:
The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} has these weaknesses:

Forbiddance. The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can't enter a residence without an invitation from an occupant.

Running Water. The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} takes 20 Acid damage if it ends its turn in running water.

Stake to the Heart. The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} is destroyed if a weapon that deals Piercing damage is driven into the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}'s heart while the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} has the Incapacitated condition.

Sunlight. The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} takes 20 Radiant damage if it starts its turn in sunlight. While in sunlight, it has Disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks.

Disadv. Attacks & Checks.name: Disadv. Attacks & Checks
Disadv. Attacks & Checks.description: While in sunlight, it has Disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks.

Vampire Familiar.name: Vampire Familiar
Vampire Familiar.description:
Vampires

Vampiric Connection.name: Vampiric Connection
Vampiric Connection.description: While the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} and its vampire master are on the same plane of existence, the vampire can communicate with the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} telepathically, and the vampire can perceive through the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}'s senses.

Umbral Dagger.description: [[/attack extended]]. [[/damage average extended]]. If the target is reduced to 0 Hit Points by this attack, the target becomes Stable but has the &Reference[Poisoned apply=false] condition for 1 hour. While it has the Poisoned condition, the target has the &Reference[Paralyzed apply=false] condition.

Poisoned & Paralyzed.name: Poisoned & Paralyzed
Poisoned & Paralyzed.description: The target has the &Reference[Poisoned apply=false] condition for 1 hour. While the target has the Poisoned condition, the target also has the &Reference[Paralyzed apply=false] condition.

Until the grapple ends, the target has the &Reference[Restrained apply=false] condition, is &Reference[suffocating]{suffocating} unless it can breathe water, and takes [[/damage average activity=khxVwH3AB0sx1qRG]] damage at the start of each of the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster}'s turns. The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can grapple one Large creature or up to two Medium or smaller creatures at a time with Whelm.

As an action, a creature within 5 feet of the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can pull a creature out of it by succeeding on a [[/check ath dc=@skills.ath.passive format=long]].

Success: Half damage only.

Its game statistics, other than its size, are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed.

Foundry Note

This feature also provides an Active Effect (AE) that will modify this creature's speed in bear form. You can enable the AE in the effects tab of the character sheet.

First Failure: The target has the &Reference[Incapacitated apply=false] condition until the end of its next turn, when it repeats the save.

Second Failure: The target has the &Reference[Paralyzed apply=false] condition, and it repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. After 1 minute, it succeeds automatically.

Incapacitated.name: Incapacitated
Incapacitated.description: The target has the &Reference[Incapacitated apply=false] condition until the end of its next turn, when it repeats the save.

Paralyzed.name: Paralyzed
Paralyzed.description: The target has the &Reference[Paralyzed apply=false] condition, and it repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. After 1 minute, it succeeds automatically.

Young White Dragon.name: Young White Dragon
Young White Dragon.description: Arte do Token por Forgotten Adventures.

Ice Walk.name: Ice Walk
Ice Walk.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} can move across and climb icy surfaces without needing to make an ability check. Additionally, &Reference[Difficult Terrain] composed of ice or snow doesn't cost it extra movement.

Multiattack.name: Multiattack
Multiattack.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} makes three [[/item .mmRend0000000000]] attacks.

Cold Breath.name: Cold Breath
Cold Breath.description:
Constitution Saving Throw: DC [[lookup @save.dc.value activity=8P7hmd3Nron4RAIv]], each [[lookup @target.affects.type activity=8P7hmd3Nron4RAIv]] in a [[lookup @target.template.size activity=8P7hmd3Nron4RAIv]]-foot Cone.

Failure: [[/damage average]] damage.

Success: Half damage.

Undead Fortitude.name: Undead Fortitude
Undead Fortitude.description: If damage reduces the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} to 0 Hit Points, it makes a Constitution saving throw (DC 5 plus the damage taken) unless the damage is Radiant or from a Critical Hit. On a successful save, the [[lookup @name lowercase]]{monster} drops to 1 Hit Point instead.

Restrained.name: Restrained
Restrained.description: At the start of each of its turns, the &Reference[Restrained apply=false] target repeats the [[/save ability=dex]] save. On a failed save, the target takes 4d8 (plus 2d8 for each spell slot level above 5) damage of the spirit’s type. On a successful save, the target isn’t Restrained by the spirit.

Restrained.name: Restrained
Restrained.description: At the start of each of its turns, the &Reference[Restrained apply=false] target repeats the [[/save ability=dex]] save. On a failed save, the target takes 4d8 (plus 2d8 for each spell slot level above 5) damage of the spirit’s type. On a successful save, the target isn’t Restrained by the spirit.

On a failed save, the target takes 4d8 (plus 2d8 for each spell slot level above 5) damage of the spirit’s type. On a successful save, the target isn’t Restrained by the spirit.

Pack Damage.name: Pack Damage
Pack Damage.description: Whenever the pack moves within 10 feet of a creature you can see and whenever a creature you can see enters a space within 10 feet of the pack or ends its turn there, you can force that creature to make a Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save, the creature takes 3d10 Slashing damage. A creature makes this save only once per turn.

Slam.name: Slam
Slam.description: Melee Attack Roll: Bonus equals your spell attack modifier, reach 5 ft. Hit: Force damage equal to 2d12 + 3 + your spellcasting ability modifier.

Slam.name: Slam
Slam.description: Melee Attack Roll: Bonus equals your spell attack modifier, reach 5 ft. Hit: Force damage equal to 2d6 + 3 + your spellcasting ability modifier.

Slam.name: Slam
Slam.description: Melee Attack Roll: Bonus equals your spell attack modifier, reach 5 ft. Hit: Force damage equal to 1d4 + 3.

Shared Resistances.name: Shared Resistances
Shared Resistances.description:
When you summon the spirit, choose one of its Resistances. You have &Reference[damageresistance]{Resistance} to the chosen damage type until the spell ends.

Foundry Note

Active effects and activities applying those effects on this item are provided for optional application of the chosen resistance.

Multiattack.name: Multiattack
Multiattack.description:
The spirit makes a number of [[/item Rend]] attacks equal to half the spell's level (round down), and it uses [[/item Breath Weapon]].

[[floor(@flags.dnd5e.summon.level / 2)]]{Number of attacks}

Rend.name: Rend
Rend.description: Melee Attack: Bonus equals your spell attack modifier, reach 10 feet. Hit: 1d6 + 4 + the spell's level Piercing damage.

Breath Weapon.name: Breath Weapon
Breath Weapon.description: Dexterity Saving Throw: DC equals your spell save DC, each creature in a 30-foot Cone. Failure: 2d6 damage of a type this spirit has Resistance to (your choice when you cast the spell). Success: Half damage.

Bite.name: Bite
Bite.description: At the start of each of your turns, the hound attempts to bite one enemy within 5 feet of it. That enemy must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw or take 4d8 Force damage.

Invisible.name: Invisible
Invisible.description: @Embed[Compendium.dnd5e.rules.JournalEntry.w7eitkpD7QQTB6j0.JournalEntryPage.3UU5GCTVeRDbZy9u inline]

Spider Climb.name: Spider Climb
Spider Climb.description: The insect can climb difficult surfaces, including along ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

Multiattack.name: Multiattack
Multiattack.description:
The insect makes a number of attacks equal to half this spell's level (round down).

[[floor(@flags.dnd5e.summon.level / 2)]]{Number of attacks}

Poison Jab.name: Poison Jab
Poison Jab.description: Melee Attack Roll: Bonus equals your spell attack modifier, reach 10 ft. Hit: 1d6 + 3 plus the spell's level Piercing damage plus 1d4 Poison damage.

Web Bolt.name: Web Bolt
Web Bolt.description: Ranged Attack Roll: Bonus equals your spell attack modifier, range 60 ft. Hit: 1d10 + 3 plus the spell's level Bludgeoning damage, and the target's Speed is reduced to 0 until the start of the insect's next turn.

Webbed.name: Webbed
Webbed.description: The target’s Speed is reduced to 0 until the start of the insect’s next turn.

Venomous Spew.name: Venomous Spew
Venomous Spew.description: Constitution Saving Throw: Your spell save DC, one creature the insect can see within 10 feet. Failure: The target has the &Reference[Poisoned apply=false] condition until the start of the insect's next turn.

Poisoned.name: Poisoned
Poisoned.description: The target has the &Reference[Poisoned apply=false] condition until the start of the insect’s next turn.

Life Bond.name: Life Bond
Life Bond.description: When you regain Hit Points from a level 1+ spell, the steed regains the same number of Hit Points if you're within 5 feet of it.

Otherworldly Slam.name: Otherworldly Slam
Otherworldly Slam.description: Melee Attack Roll: Bonus equals your spell attack modifier, reach 5 ft. Hit: 1d8 plus the spell's level of Radiant (Celestial), Psychic (Fey), or Necrotic (Fiend) damage.

Fell Glare.name: Fell Glare
Fell Glare.description: Wisdom Saving Throw: DC equals your spell save DC, one creature within 60 feet the steed can see. Failure: The target has the &Reference[frightened apply=false] condition until the end of your next turn.

Fey Step.name: Fey Step
Fey Step.description: The steed teleports, along with its rider, to an unoccupied space of your choice up to 60 feet away from itself.

Healing Touch.name: Healing Touch
Healing Touch.description: One creature within 5 feet of the steed regains a number of Hit Points equal to 2d8 plus the spell's level.

Life Bond.name: Life Bond
Life Bond.description: When you regain Hit Points from a level 1+ spell, the steed regains the same number of Hit Points if you're within 5 feet of it.

Otherworldly Slam.name: Otherworldly Slam
Otherworldly Slam.description: Melee Attack Roll: Bonus equals your spell attack modifier, reach 5 ft. Hit: 1d8 plus the spell's level of Radiant damage.

Healing Touch.name: Healing Touch
Healing Touch.description: One creature within 5 feet of the steed regains a number of Hit Points equal to 2d8 plus the spell's level.

Life Bond.name: Life Bond
Life Bond.description: When you regain Hit Points from a level 1+ spell, the steed regains the same number of Hit Points if you're within 5 feet of it.

Otherworldly Slam.name: Otherworldly Slam
Otherworldly Slam.description: Melee Attack Roll: Bonus equals your spell attack modifier, reach 5 ft. Hit: 1d8 plus the spell's level of Psychic damage.

Fey Step.name: Fey Step
Fey Step.description: The steed teleports, along with its rider, to an unoccupied space of your choice up to 60 feet away from itself.

Life Bond.name: Life Bond
Life Bond.description: When you regain Hit Points from a level 1+ spell, the steed regains the same number of Hit Points if you're within 5 feet of it.

Otherworldly Slam.name: Otherworldly Slam
Otherworldly Slam.description: Melee Attack Roll: Bonus equals your spell attack modifier, reach 5 ft. Hit: 1d8 plus the spell's level of Necrotic damage.

Fell Glare.name: Fell Glare
Fell Glare.description: Wisdom Saving Throw: DC equals your spell save DC, one creature within 60 feet the steed can see. Failure: The target has the &Reference[frightened] condition until the end of your next turn.

Slam.name: Slam
Slam.description: Melee Attack Roll: Bonus equals your spell attack modifier, reach 5 ft. Hit: Force damage equal to 1d4 + 3.

Move.name: Move
Move.description: As a Bonus Action, you can move the eye up to 30 feet in any direction. A solid barrier blocks the eye's movement, but the eye can pass through an opening as small as 1 inch in diameter.

Invisible.name: Invisible
Invisible.description: @Embed[Compendium.dnd5e.rules.JournalEntry.w7eitkpD7QQTB6j0.JournalEntryPage.3UU5GCTVeRDbZy9u inline]

Clenched Fist.name: Clenched Fist
Clenched Fist.description: The hand strikes a target within 5 feet of it. Make a melee spell attack. On a hit, the target takes 5d8 Force damage.

Forceful Hand.name: Forceful Hand
Forceful Hand.description: The hand attempts to push a Huge or smaller creature within 5 feet of it. The target must succeed on a Strength saving throw, or the hand pushes the target up to 5 feet plus a number of feet equal to five times your spellcasting ability modifier. The hand moves with the target, remaining within 5 feet of it.

Grasping Hand.name: Grasping Hand
Grasping Hand.description:
The hand attempts to grapple a Huge or smaller creature within 5 feet of it. The target must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw, or the target has the &Reference[Grappled] condition, with an escape DC equal to your spell save DC. While the hand grapples the target, you can take a Bonus Action to cause the hand to crush it, dealing Bludgeoning damage to the target equal to 4d6 plus your spellcasting ability modifier.

Grapple Escape Tests

[[/check ability=str skill=ath dc=8+@prof+@flags.dnd5e.summon.mod]]{Strength (Athletics)} [[/check ability=dex skill=acr dc=8+@prof+@flags.dnd5e.summon.mod]]{Dexterity (Acrobatics)}

Interposing Hand.name: Interposing Hand
Interposing Hand.description: The hand grants you &Reference[HalfCover] against attacks and other effects that originate from its space or that pass through it. In addition, its space counts as &Reference[DifficultTerrain] for your enemies.

Interposed.name: Interposed
Interposed.description: Granting you &Reference[HalfCover] from attacks or effects that pass through its space.

Restrained.name: Restrained
Restrained.description: At the start of each of its turns, the &Reference[Restrained apply=false] target repeats the [[/save ability=dex]] save. On a failed save, the target takes 4d8 (plus 2d8 for each spell slot level above 5) damage of the spirit’s type. On a successful save, the target isn’t Restrained by the spirit.

Frightened.name: Frightened
Frightened.description: The target has the &Reference[Frightened apply=false] condition until the start of your next turn, with both you and the spirit as the source of the fear.

Flames.name: Flames
Flames.description: You create a 5-foot-diameter sphere of fire in an unoccupied space on the ground within range. It lasts for the duration. Any creature that ends its turn within 5 feet of the sphere makes a Dexterity saving throw, taking 2d6 Fire damage on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful one.

Roll.name: Roll
Roll.description:
As a Bonus Action, you can move the sphere up to 30 feet, rolling it along the ground. If you move the sphere into a creature's space, that creature makes the save against the sphere, and the sphere stops moving for the turn.

When you move the sphere, you can direct it over barriers up to 5 feet tall and jump it across pits up to 10 feet wide. Flammable objects that aren't being worn or carried start burning if touched by the sphere.

Carry Weight Adjustment.name: Carry Weight Adjustment
Carry Weight Adjustment.description:
Foundry Note

This item serves to offset the disk's computed carry weight capacity from 510 lbs. to 500 lbs. in accordance with the spell's description.

Guarded Area.name: Guarded Area
Guarded Area.description:
Any enemy that moves to a space within 10 feet of the guardian for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there makes a Dexterity saving throw, taking 20 Radiant damage on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful one. The guardian vanishes when it has dealt a total of 60 damage.

Foundry Note

This feature's Limited Uses is optionally provided for tracking the total damage dealt by the guardian. Additionally, The Consume Damage Pool activity is configured with scaling uses consumption in increments of 5 damage for use after the final damage is determined and applied.

Move and Attack.name: Move and Attack
Move and Attack.description: On your later turns, you can take a Bonus Action to move the sword up to 30 feet to a spot you can see and repeat the attack against the same target or a different one. On a hit, the target takes Force damage equal to 4d12 plus your spellcasting ability modifier.

Move and Attack.name: Move and Attack
Move and Attack.description:
As a Bonus Action on your later turns, you can move the force up to 20 feet and repeat the attack against a creature within 5 feet of it. On a hit, the target takes Force damage equal to 1d8 plus your spellcasting ability modifier.

Using a Higher-Level Spell Slot. The damage increases by 1d8 for every slot level above 2.

Invisible.description: @Embed[Compendium.dnd5e.rules.JournalEntry.w7eitkpD7QQTB6j0.JournalEntryPage.3UU5GCTVeRDbZy9u inline]

Hooves.name: Hooves
Hooves.description: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) Bludgeoning damage.

Slam.name: Slam
Slam.description: Melee Attack Roll: Bonus equals your spell attack modifier, reach 5 ft. Hit: Force damage equal to 1d4 + 3.
